title: Useful Renewable Villager Trades
aliases: which villager trades are worth it
quickAnswer: The best renewable trades usually convert easy farmed materials into emeralds, then turn emeralds into long-term upgrades like enchanted books, golden carrots, arrows, and utility blocks.
keyFacts: High-value emerald generators include farmer crop trades, fletcher stick trades, and cleric rotten flesh trades.
High-value purchases include librarian books, farmer golden carrots, mason quartz or brick blocks, and toolsmith or armorer diamond gear in some setups.
Renewable matters most when the alternative is a limited structure loot source or a slow manual farm.
commonMistakes: Judging a trade by raw emerald cost without asking whether the input material is easy to automate.
Buying random enchanted gear when a targeted book trade would be more reusable.
